offer: For property managers processing 5–15 inspections/month, delays in reporting cause tenant dissatisfaction. We streamline the inspection process instead of manual inspection processes using paper forms.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on workflows
DM outreach to 20-50 property managers with demo
Participate in forums for property management tools
try_it: Let users try digital checklists and manual invoice entry
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path

Produce a demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Enable CSV import for existing data
